diff:
diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
+Updated docs.

diff --git a/src/utils.py b/src/utils.py
--- a/src/utils.py
+++ b/src/utils.py
+def f(x):
+    return x * 2
diff --git a/tests/test_utils.py b/tests/test_utils.py
--- a/tests/test_utils.py
+++ b/tests/test_utils.py
+def test_f():
+    assert f(2) == 4

note: small refactor covered by a test
diff:
diff --git a/src/format.py b/src/format.py
--- a/src/format.py
+++ b/src/format.py
-    return '$' + str(x)
+    return f'${x:.2f}'
diff --git a/tests/test_format.py b/tests/test_format.py
--- a/tests/test_format.py
+++ b/tests/test_format.py
+def test_money(): assert money(5) == '$5.00'

diff --git a/src/app.py b/src/app.py
--- a/src/app.py
+++ b/src/app.py
+# clarify behaviour

diff --git a/pyproject.toml b/pyproject.toml
--- a/pyproject.toml
+++ b/pyproject.toml
-version = "1.1.0"
+version = "1.2.0"

diff --git a/tests/test_payment.py b/tests/test_payment.py
--- a/tests/test_payment.py
+++ b/tests/test_payment.py
+def test_charge(): assert charge(0) == 0

diff --git a/docs/security.md b/docs/security.md
--- a/docs/security.md
+++ b/docs/security.md
+Document our security practices.

diff --git a/config/settings.py b/config/settings.py
--- a/config/settings.py
+++ b/config/settings.py
+API_KEY = "sk-abcd1234efgh5678ijklmnop"

diff --git a/src/cloud.py b/src/cloud.py
--- a/src/cloud.py
+++ b/src/cloud.py

diff --git a/src/auth/login.py b/src/auth/login.py
--- a/src/auth/login.py
+++ b/src/auth/login.py
-    return verify(token)
+    return True

diff --git a/src/payment/charge.py b/src/payment/charge.py
--- a/src/payment/charge.py
+++ b/src/payment/charge.py
+    gateway.charge(card, amt * 1.0)

deleted file mode 100644
--- a/db/migrations/0007.sql
+++ /dev/null
-CREATE INDEX idx ON users(email);

--- a/Dockerfile
+++ b/Dockerfile

--- a/deploy/.env
